note: shs_chosen is a submodule of shs that layers the Chosen jQuery plugin onto the SHS cascading dropdowns via a subclassed widget and Backbone view overrides. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: I already use the SHS cascading taxonomy widget but want each level dropdown to be a searchable Chosen box. Which module/widget do I switch to and what must be enabled?
evals.expected_output: Enable the shs_chosen submodule (which needs both shs and the chosen module) and set the field's form-display widget to 'Simple hierarchical select: Chosen' (options_shs_chosen).

evals.prompt: What are the module dependencies of shs_chosen?
evals.expected_output: It depends on shs:shs and chosen:chosen — both the Simple Hierarchical Select module and the contrib Chosen module must be enabled.

evals.prompt: How do I give one SHS Chosen field its own Chosen settings instead of using the site-wide Chosen configuration?
evals.expected_output: Check the chosen_override setting on the options_shs_chosen widget; then the chosen_settings group (disable_search, search_contains, placeholder texts, no_results_text) is used for that field instead of the global chosen.settings config.

evals.prompt: Which per-field Chosen setting hides the search box, and which one lets a search match text in the middle of a word?
evals.expected_output: chosen_settings.disable_search hides the Chosen search box; chosen_settings.search_contains makes the search match anywhere in a word.

evals.prompt: How does shs_chosen actually apply Chosen to the SHS widget without rewriting it? Name what it swaps.
evals.expected_output: It implements hook_shs_class_definitions_alter to swap the Backbone view classes to Drupal.shs_chosen.ChosenAppView / ChosenWidgetView and adds a display.chosen JS settings block, so the existing SHS cascade is enhanced by Chosen; it also swaps the Views term-filter classes.

evals.prompt: Does the Chosen styling also apply to SHS exposed filters in Views?
evals.expected_output: Yes — shs_chosen_views_plugins_filter_alter swaps the SHS taxonomy_index_tid / taxonomy_index_tid_depth filter classes to the ShsChosenTaxonomyIndexTid* variants, so exposed hierarchical Views filters get Chosen too.
